title: Bootstrap Apps/Client workspace and generated Apple project flow
summary: Create the initial Apps/Client layout, package boundaries, and Xcode project generation strategy without removing the current Sources/App placeholder.
scope: Create Apps/Client package skeleton and module directories
Add project generation config for a reproducible .xcodeproj
Document how Sources/App coexists temporarily with Apps/Client
Add initial README/build notes for the new app workspace
acceptance_criteria: Apps/Client exists and has a compilable package skeleton
An .xcodeproj can be generated from repo state
No existing root package products are broken
Sources/App remains untouched or only documented
